prose.en: Hardware is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk
Replace hardware when it lacks needed security capabilities or when it cannot support software with needed security capabilities
Define and implement plans for hardware end-of-life maintenance support and obsolescence
Perform hardware disposal in a secure, responsible, and auditable manner

nist-withdrawal.label: PR.DS-03
nist-withdrawal.title: PR.DS-03
nist-withdrawal.prose: Assets are formally managed throughout removal, transfers, and disposition

nist-withdrawal.label: PR.MA-01
nist-withdrawal.title: PR.MA-01
nist-withdrawal.prose: Maintenance and repair of organizational assets are performed and logged, with approved and controlled tools
